title: coincya rupestris subsp. rupestris
intro: Coincya rupestris subsp. rupestris, also known as Sheep's Fescue, is a perennial plant in the grass family native to the western Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Coincya rupestris subsp. rupestris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and alleviate symptoms of certain conditions. Coincya rupestris subsp. rupestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
